narration: DFS can use preorder to go node, then left branch, then right branch.
callout: A preorder DFS starts at the root and goes down one side.

narration: BFS visits level by level, so it sees 8 first, then 3 and 10, then 1, 6, and 14.
decision: BFS looks across a whole row before going lower.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Which strategy uses a queue to stay level by level?

choices.label: BFS
choices.feedback: Correct. BFS uses a queue to keep level order.

choices.label: DFS
choices.feedback: Not this one. DFS usually goes deep with recursion.

narration: Both traversals visit every node, but they tell the story of the tree in different orders.
callout: Different visit order can be useful for different jobs.
